title: Dark Mode Skyblock
description: Texture Pack to make most things darker in Hypixel Skyblock
body:
A simple dark mode resource pack for Hypixel Skyblock that reduces brightness and visual clutter while keeping the vanilla look.

It darkens many textures, mainly in the Dwarven Mines and The End, but also in many other areas.

It is designed for Minecraft 1.21+ and should work fine with other texture packs.

If you want additional textures to be darkened, feel free to report them here: [https://github.com/Toflking/Dark-Mode-Pack/issues](https://github.com/Toflking/Dark-Mode-Pack/issues)

I also made a Dark Mode Lava texture. It is released as a separate pack, which you can find here: [https://modrinth.com/project/darkmodelava](https://modrinth.com/project/darkmodelava)

Here are some examples from the End and the Mist:

![The End, the left side shows Vanilla Minecraft, the right side shows the Darkmode Texturepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa09639f7ab42f6d8fbf807dcd428a02f356f5a4_0.webp)
![The Mist, the left side shows Vanilla Minecraft, the right side shows the Darkmode Texturepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8729737679a2f35582c299cf6369f5a8f8461ae6_0.webp)

Screenshots in the Gallery show some Examples
